infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX 17 - 19 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 12:00 Friday July 17 2026, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, TGR Haas F1 Team Document 9 Date 17 July 2026 Time 09:51 No / Drive

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX
17 - 19 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 12:00 Friday July 17
2026, in relation to the incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
TGR Haas F1 Team
Document 9
Date 17 July 2026
Time 09:51
No / Driver 31 - Esteban Ocon
Reason Alleged breach of Article B10.1.1.a of the FIA F1 Regulations - Late attendance of
the Thursday Press Conference. 
Gerd Ennser Matthew Selley
Alfonso Orihuela Pedro Lamy
Loïc Bacquelaine
